metadata.description: Doctrine for drafting, auditing, and fixing Elegy skills. Use when creating a new skill, running an audit against an existing one, or triaging structural and content findings. Ships the canonical template, audit checklist, anti-pattern catalogue, and severity ladder.
metadata.summary: Doctrinal guidance plus reference material for writing and reviewing Elegy SKILL.md bodies against the canonical template.
metadata.author: Elegy Contributors

capabilities.name: Walk Audit Checklist
capabilities.description: Walk the objective audit checks in references/audit-checklist.md against a SKILL.md body or fixture. Today this is a manual process; a future `elegy skill audit` command will back this capability with machine checks.

parameters.name: skillPath
parameters.description: Path to the SKILL.md body or governed fixture to audit.

output.description: Findings list grouped by severity from references/severity-ladder.md.

capabilities.name: Look Up Anti-Pattern
capabilities.description: Look up the canonical anti-pattern catalogue in references/anti-patterns.md by id and return the pattern, the failure mode, and the replacement.

parameters.name: antiPatternId
parameters.description: Anti-pattern id such as AP-1 (command list) or AP-7 (marketing description).

output.description: Anti-pattern entry with name, why it fails, and replacement.

capabilities.name: Emit Skill Template
capabilities.description: Emit the canonical SKILL.md skeleton from assets/skill-template.md with placeholders preserved. Use as the starting point for new skills or as a target for diffing an existing skill against the canonical shape.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Output format. `markdown` returns the literal template body; `outline` returns just the section headings.

constraints.description: This skill is doctrine plus reference material. There is no Rust CLI implementation yet. Capabilities resolve to the in-tree references; the future `elegy skill audit` command will back the audit and lookup capabilities.
assets/skill-template.md is the canonical SKILL.md skeleton. Section order is normative. References/audit-checklist.md is the contract that decides pass/fail.

triggers.description: When an agent needs to create a new Elegy skill from scratch using the canonical template.
When an agent needs to walk the audit checklist against a SKILL.md body and produce a findings list.
When an agent needs to address audit findings and rewrite a SKILL.md against the template.
